title: costaff.agent.json
description: Manifest declared by every CoStaff agent project at its repo root. See docs/AGENT_PROTOCOL_v1.0.md for normative semantics.

protocol_version.description: CoStaff Agent Protocol version this agent targets, MAJOR.MINOR.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case identifier; must start with 'costaff-agent-'.

version.description: The agent's own semver (independent of protocol_version).

description.description: One- or few-sentence summary surfaced in the dashboard.

a2a_service.description: Hostname suffix at which the A2A endpoint is reachable inside the costaff_default network.

port.description: Port the A2A endpoint listens on inside the container. SHOULD be 8081.

env_required.description: Env vars that MUST be present at runtime.

env_optional.description: Env vars the agent SHOULD function without.

env_shared.description: Env vars the CLI may auto-fill from the user's main .env.

env_auto.description: Env vars the CLI populates automatically (e.g. <NAME>_AGENT_MCP_URLS).

model_env_var.description: Name of the env var the agent reads to pick its model.

mcp_configurable.description: If true, the dashboard exposes the per-agent MCP whitelist editor.

mcp_env_var.description: Name of the env var receiving the per-agent MCP URL bundle. Required when mcp_configurable is true.

costaff_sdk_version.description: Semver range describing the minimum CoStaff CLI / core version this agent needs.

^x_.description: Reserved namespace for forward-compatible extension fields.
